<div align="center">

# TheStack-ai

**Claude Code tools and AI coding agent utilities**

Open-source developer tools for AI-assisted coding workflows.

</div>

## Projects

### Skill & Agent Quality

- **[pulser](https://github.com/TheStack-ai/pulser)** — SKILL.md linter for Claude Code. 8 diagnostic rules, auto-fix, type classification, and GitHub Action.
- **[swing-skills](https://github.com/TheStack-ai/swing-skills)** — AI agent guardrails. 6 cognitive firewalls that force source verification, adversarial review, and structured reasoning.

### System Utilities

- **[zclean](https://github.com/TheStack-ai/zclean)** — Kill zombie processes left by AI coding tools. Automatic orphan process cleaner for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor.
- **[ur-dashboard](https://github.com/TheStack-ai/ur-dashboard)** — Real-time monitoring dashboard for Claude Code agents. API costs, token usage, team status.

### AI Infrastructure

- **[mrstack](https://github.com/TheStack-ai/mrstack)** — Claude Code Telegram daemon. Runs 24/7 as a background service, works when terminal is closed.
- **[jarvis-orb](https://github.com/TheStack-ai/jarvis-orb)** — Persistent memory MCP server + real-time 3D brain visualizer for Claude Code.

---

All tools are MIT licensed and designed to work with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and other AI coding agents.
